title: Sous X
overview: Jean-Jacques spent 9 years in prison for robbery. When he comes out, he finds the neighborhood where he grew up but things have changed ... The country is in crisis, the young people are holding the business and his old friends are urging him to resume his activities ... It may be for Jean-Jacques the time to ask the right questions.

trailers.title: Sous X / Bande annonce 1 [Au cinéma le 14 janvier 2015]
